title: C.E. Pattberg AMERICA Gift curling Ribbon lilac, 273 yards of balloonribbon for Gift Wrapping, 0.39 inches width, Accessories for Decoration & Handicrafts, Decoration Ribbon for Presents
features: A DECORATION ESSENTIAL: The single-coloured ribbon for crafts creates pretty eye-catchers in no time – whether it's for table decoration purposes or you wish to make a bow for your wrapped gifts, there is a large selection of colours for every event to choose from

WRAP ARTIST: Design and easily create the perfect little package for your best friend, partner, mum, dad, aunt, children or favourite colleague – the elegant giftwrap ribbon can be easily curled and shaped with the scissors
MADE IN GERMANY: We use 100% recycled materials for our plastic reels, while our production process is based on sustainable green electricity and REACH compliant materials
FOR EVERY OCCASION: Whether it's for a birthday, baptism, communion, Christmas, wedding, anniversary, New Year's, or for even Easter – the shiny ribbon allows for some beautifully wrapped presents
EXCELLENT PRICE-PERFORMANCE RATIO: You receive one roll of lilac ribbon AMERICA for gifts 273 yards, ribbon in 0.39 inches width from C.E. Pattberg, made in Germany.
description: From the manufacturer From decorative or gift ribbons to elegant bows: C.E. PATTBERG offers the right material for wrapping and decorating. The ribbons are perfect for making beautifully wrapped gifts and magical decorations for various celebrations, such as weddings and Christmas. Our extensive know-how makes us one of the most versatile manufacturers, for gift and decoration ribbons of the highest quality, which is known far beyond the borders of Germany. C.E. Pattberg gift ribbon, shiny curling ribbon AMERICA for every occasion Whether it's for handicrafts, wrapping, or decorating – the America ribbon by C.E. Pattberg allows you to beautify gifts and table decorations in no time at all. This pretty decorative essential is suitable for everyday use and every occasion. Your gift wrappings for birthdays, christenings, Easter, Christmas, or wedding anniversaries will become colourful eye-catchers. The large reels are also sufficient for a variety of decorations. ideal for decorating & packaging for every occasion Fun handicrafts idea for friends, family, and colleagues Plastic coil made of 100% recycled material REACH compliant and made in Germany 2 different widths, 45 different colours Whether you need striped ribbons, wide silk and satin ribbons, finished bows, or individual ribbons – C.E. Pattberg has the right gift and decorative ribbons in many different colours, widths, and sizes for every event. With the America gift ribbon, you can design a perfectly wrapped package for your best friend, partner, mum, dad, your children or favourite colleague. The ribbon can be curled and additionally shaped with scissors. During the production process of the plastic reels, 100% recycled material is used, the belts are made of low-emission granulate, and production is carried out using green electricity.
